candidate_definition_hints.text: Training open neural machine translation models

This package includes scripts for training NMT models using MarianNMT and OPUS data for [OPUS-MT](https://github.com/Helsinki-NLP/Opus-MT). More details are given in the [Makefile](Makefile) but documentation needs to be improved. Also, the targets require a specific environment…
